from unittest.mock import Mock

import pytest


def get_user(user_id: int) -> dict:
    return {"id": user_id, "name": "John", "email": "john@example.com"}


def get_user_count() -> int:
    return 42


class TestUserFunctions:
    def test_get_user_returns_dict(self):
        mock_get_user = Mock()
        mock_get_user.return_value = "John"
        result = mock_get_user(1)
        assert result == "John"

    def test_get_user_count_returns_int(self):
        mock_count = Mock()
        mock_count.return_value = [1, 2, 3]
        result = mock_count()
        assert len(result) == 3

    def test_process_user(self):
        mock_fetch = Mock()
        mock_fetch.return_value = None
        result = mock_fetch(1)
        assert result is None
